claim_boundary: v6.0.3 derives the sigma quadratic-operator architecture and a finite family of admissible conditional sources. The parent action does not select their couplings, coefficients, physical signature, or a stable phase.
compact: discrete spectrum with finite multiplicities for elliptic self-adjoint compact-domain problem
crossing_direction: d lambda_phys/dc=<f_0,(dH/dc)f_0> for a normalized simple eigenmode and action-derived control c

harmonic_selection_test.coherence: constructive selection requires action-derived nonzero off-diagonal C_mn and a coherent phase relation
harmonic_selection_test.octave: omega_m/omega_n=2^p is admissible only as a derived dimensionless spectral relation
harmonic_selection_test.order_of_magnitude: base-10 grouping alone is representation/bookkeeping, not an action selection law

lambda_phys: lowest non-gauge normalizable eigenvalue in the declared self-adjoint domain
noncompact: continuous spectrum may occur; threshold uses the spectral infimum and normalizable/bound-state qualification
reason: coupling, background, domain, coherence matrix, and control source are not selected
zero_modes: symmetry or collective zero modes must be projected before lambda_phys
